preflight.note: Created before changing work ledger, schemas, or validators for this process fix.

acceptance_criteria.text: The work ledger states that numbered work must be created before implementation starts.
Repository validation checks a machine-readable preflight marker on new work items.
Existing completed work remains valid through explicit legacy handling, while new work items must carry the preflight marker.
Closeout evidence documents the original miss for 008/009 and the new protection.
